title: Ackee and Salt Hash
description: A Caribbean-inspired breakfast dish featuring ackee, a traditional Jamaican ingredient, paired with crispy salted hash.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the bacon slices and cook until crispy, about 4-5 minutes.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add the hash browns to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until golden brown and crispy.
Add the ackee to the skillet and stir to combine with the hash browns.
Crack the eggs into the skillet and scramble them with the ackee and hash browns.
Stir in the salt and black pepper to taste.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the eggs are cooked through.
Serve the ackee and hash mixture hot, topped with the crispy bacon and melted American cheese.
